habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Leaping Charge (Ex) A velociraptor can jump while charging, allowing it to ignore difficult terrain when it charges. When a velociraptor makes a charge in this way, it deals double damage with its talons.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Leaping Charge (Ex) A velociraptor can jump while charging, allowing it to ignore difficult terrain when it charges. When a velociraptor makes a charge in this way, it deals double damage with its talons.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Velociraptor
N Small animal
Init +7
Senses low-light vision, scent; Perception +10
AC 15, touch 14, flat-footed 12 (+3 Dex, +1 natural, +1 size)
hp 22 ((3d8+9))
Fort +6, Ref +6, Will +3
Speed 60 ft.
Melee Bite +6 (1d4+1 piercing)
Melee 2 talon +6 (1d6+1 slashing)
Special Attacks leaping charge
Special Abilities Leaping Charge (Ex) A velociraptor can jump while charging, allowing it to ignore difficult terrain when it charges. When a velociraptor makes a charge in this way, it deals double damage with its talons.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 13, Dex 17, Con 17, Int 2, Wis 14, Cha 14
Base Atk +2; CMB +2; CMD 15
Feats Improved Initiative, Weapon Finesse
Skills Acrobatics +11 (+23 when jumping), Perception +10, Stealth +15
Environment  warm forests or plains
Organization solitary, pair, or pack (3-12)
Treasure none
Defensive Abilities evasion
Source PFRPG Bestiary 4
